subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath purposed to make mention of the handmaidens of God, glorified be His majesty, that divine remembrance may reach the maidservants of that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم اراده نموده کنیزهای حق جل جلاله را ذکر نماید تا ذکر الهی اماء آن ارض
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
